text: Looking for a food truck last minute for today! 11:30am-3:30pm! In naples!  Pm Me!
Hi in search of a couple food trucks for Saturday afternoon 12-4pm! In Naples! PM me!

🚨Last year before my account got suspended we were on track ahead 10,000 followers pretty quickly. If y’all remember, I promised a free community barbecue as a thank you once either of my platforms broke 10k . Well, now that we’re off suspension and back cranking out social media, We are getting very very close!!!! Take a look at our follower count! FREE COMMUNITY BBQ STILL STANDS! 🚨 Looks like we will be starting to make plans here soon! 🔥🔥🔥🙏🏻🙏🏻🙏🏻

🚨 TOMORROW!!! 🚨Fort Myers its the 2nd annual Oddities & Art Market! 📅 May 9, 2026 ⏰ 11AM–6PM 📍 Lee County Civic Center 🎟️ ADVANCED DISCOUNT TICKETS ARE ONLY $10, BUT ONLY UNTIL MIDNIGHT TONIGHT! At midnight, online tickets increase to $15, and tomorrow tickets will be: 💵 $15 CASH at the door 💳 $17 CREDIT CARD at the door ⚡ Buy now, save money, and skip the line tomorrow!🎟️ Discount tickets available exclusively at: https://www.accessartfl.org 
💛 Every ticket makes a difference — 100% of proceeds benefit Access Art and the Access Scholarship, helping provide underprivileged youth with access to the arts. Come celebrate all things strange, spooky, creative, and wonderful with:
✨ Oddities vendors
🎨 Local artists & crafters
🔮 Tarot & psychic readings
💎 Gems & crystals
🍔 Food trucks
🖤 Handmade treasures & unexpected finds
Don’t miss one of Southwest Florida’s most unique art and culture events where creativity meets community and every ticket supports a cause.
